summary: Tested new 'Conexões por Categoria' feature on /admin/online-users. Backend GET /api/admin/online-users/login-count returns total/successful/by_category and sum of by_category == successful. Frontend renders existing 'Conexões Registradas' card unchanged plus 5 new category cards (Professores, Alunos, Assistência Social, Saúde, Administrativas), all sum to the same value. Regression flows (Atualizar, online users table) work. 4/4 pytest passed; UI verified live.
critical_code_review_comments: admin.py: by_category uses a single aggregation pipeline grouped by user_role — clean and efficient. Considere normalizar 'user_role' (lowercase) caso surjam variações case-sensitive em audit_logs futuros.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live values at test time: total=4781, successful=4623, by_category={professores:67, alunos:67, assistencia_social:31, saude:26, administrativas:4432}. Sum=4623=successful. Frontend reflects same numbers (incremented to 4625 by end due to new logins during test). UI testids: total-connections-card/-value (mantido), connections-by-category (container), conn-cat-{professores|alunos|assistencia|saude|administrativas}(-value). Login endpoint returns access_token. Route is /admin/online-users.
